# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Configuring snapshot repository
snapshot.repository.s3:
  type: s3
  bucket: my-snapshot-bucket
  region: us-east-1

# Configuring snapshot scheduler
snapshot.schedule:
  interval: 1h
  indices: '*'

# Configuring snapshot creation
snapshot.actions.periodic:
  name: hourly-snapshot
  repository: s3

# Configuring snapshot restoration
snapshot.restore.policy:
  actions:
    - repository: s3
      index: my-index
      target: restored-index
